# CF Ready — Cloudflare Go-Live Readiness
# https://ready.orangecloud.vn

> CF Ready (cf-ready) is an open-source CLI that helps developers assess whether a web application is ready to deploy on Cloudflare Workers, Pages, and related platform services.

## Product

- Name: CF Ready / Cloudflare Go-Live Readiness
- CLI: cf-ready
- NPM: @orangecloud/cf-ready
- Website: https://ready.orangecloud.vn
- Repository: https://github.com/sycu8/Cloudflare-Go-Live-Readiness

## Primary command

```bash
npx @orangecloud/cf-ready scan
```

## What it checks

- Migration readiness (Next.js, Vite, Node, static sites → Cloudflare)
- Security (headers, secrets, dependencies, CORS, env)
- AI readiness (robots.txt, llms.txt, OpenAPI, MCP)
- SEO readiness (metadata, sitemap, structured data)
- Deployment readiness (wrangler, CI, scripts)

## Safety

Read-only by default. Does not deploy or migrate automatically.

## Docs

- Getting started: https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/getting-started.html
- Commands: https://ready.orangecloud.vn/docs/commands.html
- Web Agent: https://ready.orangecloud.vn/app/
